subcodes.first_line: O soldier! The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that thou art of them that have believed and attained. Be thou thankful and numbered among them that render thanks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عسکر قلم اعلی شهادت میدهد بانک انت من الذین آمنوا و فازوا ان اشکر و کن من الشاکرین
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment
